film-television-starter.opentdb.a6f171c4.explanation: The Rat Race contestants crash a Smash Mouth benefit concert in the film's finale.
film-television-starter.opentdb.a6f171c4.details: The band performs All Star while the characters redirect the prize money to charity.

film-television-starter.opentdb.b82ddad0.explanation: Harrison Ford was suffering from dysentery while filming Raiders of the Lost Ark's Cairo chase.
film-television-starter.opentdb.b82ddad0.details: His illness helped inspire the shortened gag in which Indiana Jones simply shoots the elaborate swordsman.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e11c0968.explanation: Stargate SG-1 ran for ten seasons.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e11c0968.details: Its 214 episodes expanded the 1994 film's premise into a long-running story of interplanetary exploration and conflict.

film-television-starter.opentdb.f7717cc6.explanation: Stargate Atlantis ran for five seasons.
film-television-starter.opentdb.f7717cc6.details: The spin-off follows an expedition to the lost Ancient city of Atlantis in the Pegasus Galaxy.

film-television-starter.opentdb.152965ad.explanation: Jurassic World's engineered hybrid dinosaur is the Indominus rex.
film-television-starter.opentdb.152965ad.details: Scientists combine genetic material from multiple species, producing an intelligent predator whose abilities surprise its creators.

film-television-starter.opentdb.b0535da2.explanation: Big Hero 6 takes place in the hybrid city of San Fransokyo.
film-television-starter.opentdb.b0535da2.details: The setting blends visual features of San Francisco and Tokyo, matching the film's fusion of American superhero and Japanese cultural influences.

film-television-starter.opentdb.d5346b99.explanation: Essos lies east of Westeros across the Narrow Sea in Game of Thrones.
film-television-starter.opentdb.d5346b99.details: Major Essosi locations include the Free Cities, Slaver's Bay, and the Dothraki Sea.

film-television-starter.opentdb.8505f8de.explanation: Frank Underwood begins House of Cards as the House Majority Whip.
film-television-starter.opentdb.8505f8de.details: The leadership position gives him influence over votes and members, which he exploits during his rise toward the presidency.

film-television-starter.opentdb.541573dc.explanation: Steele's accomplices in Balto are Kaltag, Nikki, and Star.
film-television-starter.opentdb.541573dc.details: The three dogs initially follow Steele but gradually recognize Balto's courage during the medicine run.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e84c720f.explanation: Chuck Noland names his volleyball companion Wilson in Cast Away.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e84c720f.details: The name comes from the ball's brand, while a bloody handprint creates its face and helps Chuck cope with isolation.

film-television-starter.opentdb.48651b1e.explanation: The villains in Spaceballs plan to steal Planet Druidia's air.
film-television-starter.opentdb.48651b1e.details: The absurd scheme parodies planet-destroying science-fiction threats while serving President Skroob's polluted homeworld.

film-television-starter.opentdb.c2fda5b7.explanation: V urges Britain to remember the fifth of November.
film-television-starter.opentdb.c2fda5b7.details: The date invokes Guy Fawkes and the 1605 Gunpowder Plot, whose imagery V repurposes as a symbol of resistance.

film-television-starter.opentdb.6768ec1e.explanation: Cell's ultimate attack in Dragon Ball Z is the Solar Kamehameha.
film-television-starter.opentdb.6768ec1e.details: He uses the enormously amplified technique during his final struggle with Gohan.

film-television-starter.opentdb.fd403302.explanation: Eleven's favorite breakfast food in Stranger Things is Eggo waffles.
film-television-starter.opentdb.fd403302.details: The frozen waffles become a recurring symbol of Eleven's childhood tastes and her bond with Mike's group.

film-television-starter.opentdb.37d3812a.canonicalAnswer: Time and Relative Dimension in Space
aliases: Time And Relative Dimensions In Space
film-television-starter.opentdb.37d3812a.explanation: TARDIS stands for Time and Relative Dimension in Space.
film-television-starter.opentdb.37d3812a.details: The Doctor's time machine is famously bigger inside than outside and usually appears as a blue British police box.

film-television-starter.opentdb.0b9225e3.explanation: Corporal Walter O'Reilly is nicknamed Radar in M*A*S*H.
film-television-starter.opentdb.0b9225e3.details: His exceptional hearing and ability to anticipate events make it seem as though he has a built-in radar system.

film-television-starter.opentdb.00a4f415.explanation: Alan Harper's son in Two and a Half Men is Jake.
film-television-starter.opentdb.00a4f415.details: Jake, played by Angus T. Jones, is the “half” in the original title alongside adults Alan and Charlie.

film-television-starter.opentdb.ccedb6d8.explanation: Moana draws broadly from Polynesian cultures and voyaging traditions.
film-television-starter.opentdb.ccedb6d8.details: Its fictional story incorporates Pacific navigation, mythology, music, and visual motifs with consultation from people across Oceania.

film-television-starter.opentdb.5f8c65fa.explanation: Queen's A Kind of Magic appears in Highlander.
film-television-starter.opentdb.5f8c65fa.details: Queen created several songs for the 1986 fantasy film, and the resulting material shaped the album also titled A Kind of Magic.

film-television-starter.opentdb.b7f522ff.explanation: Marley is a Labrador retriever in Marley & Me.
film-television-starter.opentdb.b7f522ff.details: The energetic dog's destructive behavior and devotion anchor the story of a family's changing life and eventual loss.

film-television-starter.opentdb.0d935659.explanation: The Doctor's home planet is Gallifrey.
film-television-starter.opentdb.0d935659.details: Gallifrey is the home of the Time Lords, the civilization that mastered time travel and produced the TARDIS.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e85f908a.explanation: Spanish comedian El Risitas was born Juan Joya Borja.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e85f908a.details: His wheezing laugh in a television interview became a widely remixed internet meme beyond the Spanish-speaking world.

film-television-starter.opentdb.38ae8ac0.explanation: Ash responds to his new chainsaw hand in Evil Dead II with “Groovy.”
film-television-starter.opentdb.38ae8ac0.details: Bruce Campbell's deadpan one-word delivery became a signature catchphrase for the character.

film-television-starter.opentdb.b461ce36.explanation: Toy Story was the first fully computer-animated feature film.
film-television-starter.opentdb.b461ce36.details: Pixar released it in 1995, demonstrating that a theatrical film could be created entirely with 3D computer animation.

film-television-starter.opentdb.ff5bddc2.explanation: Officer Dibble is the policeman in Top Cat.
film-television-starter.opentdb.ff5bddc2.details: He repeatedly tries to control Top Cat's alley gang but often shows affection for them beneath the frustration.

film-television-starter.opentdb.3dd77fe0.explanation: Doctor Who began with the episode An Unearthly Child in 1963.
film-television-starter.opentdb.3dd77fe0.details: It introduces the Doctor, Susan, Ian, Barbara, and the TARDIS before sending the group into prehistoric time.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e1fcd457.explanation: Dr. No launched the Eon James Bond film series in 1962.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e1fcd457.details: Sean Connery's first Bond mission takes him to Jamaica to investigate the disappearance of a British agent.

film-television-starter.opentdb.2babdf87.explanation: Rick and Morty premiered on Adult Swim in 2013.
film-television-starter.opentdb.2babdf87.details: The animated series pairs reckless scientist Rick Sanchez with his anxious grandson Morty on dimension-spanning adventures.

film-television-starter.opentdb.b94fe374.explanation: Bryan Cranston plays Walter White in Breaking Bad.
film-television-starter.opentdb.b94fe374.details: Walter transforms from a chemistry teacher with cancer into the methamphetamine producer known as Heisenberg.

film-television-starter.opentdb.388bc681.explanation: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice brings the two heroes into conflict.
film-television-starter.opentdb.388bc681.details: The 2016 film follows Man of Steel and introduces Batman and Wonder Woman to the shared DC film continuity.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7d3a1c96.explanation: Trey Parker and Matt Stone have not won an Academy Award.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7d3a1c96.details: They have won Emmys, Tonys, and a Grammy; their song Blame Canada received an Oscar nomination but did not win.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7ad42b15.explanation: Vanessa Kensington is an Austin Powers character, not a Bond girl.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7ad42b15.details: Elizabeth Hurley plays the spy who partners with Austin in International Man of Mystery.

film-television-starter.opentdb.f7d2b3e9.explanation: The Thing was not adapted from a Stephen King novel.
film-television-starter.opentdb.f7d2b3e9.details: John Carpenter's film traces back to John W. Campbell's novella Who Goes There?, while Carpenter also adapted King's Christine.

film-television-starter.opentdb.0dc867a4.explanation: Jeff Bridges does not appear in The Hateful Eight.
film-television-starter.opentdb.0dc867a4.details: Quentin Tarantino's western ensemble includes Kurt Russell, Samuel L. Jackson, Jennifer Jason Leigh, and Walton Goggins.

film-television-starter.opentdb.06516597.explanation: Quentin Tarantino wrote and directed Kill Bill Volumes 1 and 2.
film-television-starter.opentdb.06516597.details: The two films form one revenge story centered on the Bride, played by Uma Thurman.

film-television-starter.opentdb.185ec532.explanation: Michael Westen is the burned spy at the center of Burn Notice.
film-television-starter.opentdb.185ec532.details: Stranded in Miami, he uses espionage skills to help clients while investigating who destroyed his intelligence career.

film-television-starter.opentdb.86692388.explanation: Helen Wood won the 2014 UK civilian series of Big Brother.
film-television-starter.opentdb.86692388.details: She defeated runner-up Ashleigh Coyle in the fifteenth UK series.

film-television-starter.opentdb.1bf64a78.explanation: Baron Silas Greenback is Danger Mouse's archenemy.
film-television-starter.opentdb.1bf64a78.details: The villainous toad repeatedly schemes against the mouse secret agent and his hamster assistant Penfold.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e24c67ac.explanation: Avengers: Endgame earned about $1.2 billion worldwide during its 2019 opening weekend.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e24c67ac.details: It was the first film to cross one billion dollars in its opening weekend, reflecting the culmination of the Marvel saga.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7e374006.explanation: Laura Roslin becomes president of the Twelve Colonies in Battlestar Galactica.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7e374006.details: The former education secretary inherits the office after the Cylon attack kills officials ahead of her in succession.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7620c0f3.explanation: Jon Snow's Valyrian-steel sword is Longclaw.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7620c0f3.details: Jeor Mormont gives him the ancestral blade after Jon saves him, replacing its bear pommel with a direwolf.

film-television-starter.opentdb.57cfd4fd.explanation: Particle Style is a Kekkei Tōta in Naruto.
film-television-starter.opentdb.57cfd4fd.details: It combines three elemental natures—earth, wind, and fire—rather than the two used by a Kekkei Genkai.

film-television-starter.opentdb.9fe3d7fa.explanation: The mods travel to Brighton in Quadrophenia.
film-television-starter.opentdb.9fe3d7fa.details: The seaside setting evokes the real 1964 clashes between mods and rockers and becomes central to Jimmy's disillusionment.

film-television-starter.opentdb.0a3bc242.explanation: Jackie Earle Haley plays Freddy Krueger in the 2010 A Nightmare on Elm Street.
film-television-starter.opentdb.0a3bc242.details: He succeeded Robert Englund, who had defined Freddy throughout the original film series.

film-television-starter.opentdb.a8547b13.explanation: Birdman's score is dominated by solo jazz drums.
film-television-starter.opentdb.a8547b13.details: Antonio Sánchez's improvisational percussion helps propel the film's backstage movement and apparent continuous-shot style.

film-television-starter.opentdb.f8e0e8f7.explanation: Jason Voorhees's mother is Pamela Voorhees.
film-television-starter.opentdb.f8e0e8f7.details: Pamela is the killer in the original Friday the 13th; Jason becomes the franchise's principal killer in later films.

film-television-starter.opentdb.a6661300.explanation: Tom Bombadil was omitted from Peter Jackson's Fellowship of the Ring.
film-television-starter.opentdb.a6661300.details: The enigmatic book character shelters the hobbits and seems unaffected by the Ring, but his episodes do not advance the film's central journey.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e664072f.explanation: David Tennant plays the Tenth Doctor.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e664072f.details: He led Doctor Who from 2005 to 2010 and later returned for anniversary and special appearances.

film-television-starter.opentdb.4f1046a9.explanation: Michael Scott ultimately builds a life with Holly Flax in The Office.
film-television-starter.opentdb.4f1046a9.details: Their shared humor and awkwardness make Holly a genuine match; Michael leaves Scranton to join her in Colorado.

film-television-starter.opentdb.3a295ad5.explanation: Frank Sinatra plays gambler Nathan Detroit in the 1955 film Guys and Dolls.
film-television-starter.opentdb.3a295ad5.details: Marlon Brando plays Sky Masterson in the screen adaptation of the Broadway musical.

film-television-starter.opentdb.2863d8e3.explanation: Star-Burns's real name in Community is Alex Osbourne.
film-television-starter.opentdb.2863d8e3.details: The nickname comes from his star-shaped sideburns, much to his frustration when people ignore his actual name.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e1f38f71.explanation: Tilly speaks French in the UK version of Tots TV and Spanish in the U.S. version.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e1f38f71.details: The language change preserved the educational contrast for children in each primary audience.

film-television-starter.opentdb.1b0e88dc.explanation: The Wizard of Oz crew used flavored gelatin to color the horse of a different color.
film-television-starter.opentdb.1b0e88dc.details: Because the horse could lick the coating, the edible material had to be reapplied during filming.

film-television-starter.opentdb.326b1d9d.explanation: The killer in My Bloody Valentine wears a miner's outfit and gas mask.
film-television-starter.opentdb.326b1d9d.details: The mining gear connects the murders to the town's mine disaster and gives the slasher a distinctive silhouette.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7e652735.explanation: “I love the smell of napalm in the morning” comes from Apocalypse Now.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7e652735.details: Robert Duvall's Lieutenant Colonel Kilgore says it after an attack, expressing the film's disturbing fusion of warfare and spectacle.

film-television-starter.opentdb.66582432.explanation: Bart sells his soul to Milhouse for five dollars.
film-television-starter.opentdb.66582432.details: The Simpsons episode uses Bart's resulting unease to explore belief, identity, and the value of something supposedly intangible.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7b7c5ed1.explanation: Michael Caine was born Maurice Micklewhite.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7b7c5ed1.details: He adopted his stage surname from the film The Caine Mutiny while beginning his acting career.

film-television-starter.opentdb.a784f1d9.explanation: The corrected Latin is Romani ite domum—“Romans, go home.”
film-television-starter.opentdb.a784f1d9.details: Life of Brian's centurion treats the rebel slogan as a grammar exercise and forces Brian to write the correction repeatedly.

film-television-starter.opentdb.4e3d19b8.explanation: The young warrior's name in The NeverEnding Story is spelled Atreyu.
film-television-starter.opentdb.4e3d19b8.details: Bastian reads about Atreyu's quest to save Fantasia from the Nothing and the Childlike Empress's illness.

film-television-starter.opentdb.af34a7c4.explanation: Nicolas Cage plays historian and treasure hunter Benjamin Franklin Gates in National Treasure.
film-television-starter.opentdb.af34a7c4.details: The conspicuously patriotic name suits a character who steals the Declaration of Independence to protect it and uncover clues.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7e744a3e.explanation: The dog who played Toto was named Terry.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7e744a3e.details: The female Cairn terrier appeared in numerous films and was later officially renamed Toto by her owner.

film-television-starter.opentdb.a8de0f26.explanation: Inspector Cyril “Blakey” Blake is the recurring authority figure in On the Buses.
film-television-starter.opentdb.a8de0f26.details: His attempts to discipline drivers Stan and Jack fuel much of the British sitcom's workplace comedy.

film-television-starter.opentdb.29cf1952.explanation: The Cylons are Battlestar Galactica's principal antagonists.
film-television-starter.opentdb.29cf1952.details: Created by humans, they evolve into both mechanical forms and models nearly indistinguishable from people.

film-television-starter.opentdb.8e73330e.explanation: Studio executive Sid Sheinberg suggested renaming Back to the Future as Spaceman from Pluto.
film-television-starter.opentdb.8e73330e.details: The filmmakers rejected the title, which would have overemphasized a joke involving Marty's radiation suit and 1950s science fiction.

film-television-starter.opentdb.b4ba51d8.explanation: Nickelodeon began as a cable channel called Pinwheel.
film-television-starter.opentdb.b4ba51d8.details: The name came from its preschool program Pinwheel before the service was relaunched nationally as Nickelodeon in 1979.

film-television-starter.opentdb.df789333.explanation: Arnold Schwarzenegger plays retired commando John Matrix in Commando.
film-television-starter.opentdb.df789333.details: Matrix returns to action after mercenaries kidnap his daughter, creating one of the defining high-body-count action films of the 1980s.

film-television-starter.opentdb.54f8d037.explanation: Kirk Douglas and Tony Curtis play half-brothers Einar and Eric in The Vikings.
film-television-starter.opentdb.54f8d037.details: The 1958 adventure builds a tragic rivalry around ancestry, love, and succession in a romanticized Viking world.

film-television-starter.opentdb.bc99ad37.explanation: Kurt Russell auditioned for Luke Skywalker.
film-television-starter.opentdb.bc99ad37.details: His surviving audition footage also includes readings for Han Solo; Mark Hamill and Harrison Ford ultimately received the roles.

film-television-starter.opentdb.f7541345.explanation: Alan Alda plays Arthur Shaw, the corrupt financier targeted in Tower Heist.
film-television-starter.opentdb.f7541345.details: The building employees plan a robbery after discovering Shaw has stolen their retirement money.

film-television-starter.opentdb.6dd7a3ae.explanation: Jonah Hill was not a major Freaks and Geeks cast member.
film-television-starter.opentdb.6dd7a3ae.details: The short-lived series helped launch actors including James Franco, Seth Rogen, Jason Segel, Linda Cardellini, and Busy Philipps.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e3080e54.explanation: Steven Moffat wrote for and later led Doctor Who while also co-creating Sherlock.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e3080e54.details: His work on both BBC series is known for intricate plotting, time shifts, mysteries, and rapid dialogue.

film-television-starter.opentdb.543a5e2d.explanation: Tara Strong did not voice Bubbles in the 2016 Powerpuff Girls reboot.
film-television-starter.opentdb.543a5e2d.details: Strong voiced Bubbles in the original series; Kristen Li took over the role for the reboot.

film-television-starter.opentdb.e53ae31b.explanation: Guillermo del Toro wrote and directed Pan's Labyrinth.
film-television-starter.opentdb.e53ae31b.details: The 2006 Spanish-language fantasy intertwines a girl's mythic trials with violence in post-Civil War Francoist Spain.

film-television-starter.opentdb.24aa46e6.explanation: Leonard Nimoy directed Three Men and a Baby.
film-television-starter.opentdb.24aa46e6.details: Best known as Star Trek's Spock, Nimoy also directed Star Trek III and IV before making the hit 1987 comedy.

film-television-starter.opentdb.74841f84.explanation: The Enforcer, Sudden Impact, and The Dead Pool feature Clint Eastwood's Inspector “Dirty” Harry Callahan.
film-television-starter.opentdb.74841f84.details: The San Francisco detective is defined by blunt methods, famous one-liners, and conflict with institutional restraint.

film-television-starter.opentdb.249df81e.explanation: Taking another Klingon's d'k tahg without permission is rude and dishonorable.
film-television-starter.opentdb.249df81e.details: The d'k tahg is a personal Klingon warrior's knife, so seizing it violates ownership and martial respect.

film-television-starter.opentdb.f9dc2248.details: The animated film follows Duchess and her kittens as alley cat Thomas O'Malley helps them return home in Paris.

film-television-starter.opentdb.d0459761.explanation: Victoria was filmed to appear as one continuous take.
film-television-starter.opentdb.d0459761.details: The 2015 German thriller actually used a single unbroken camera shot lasting more than two hours across central Berlin.

film-television-starter.opentdb.671e457d.explanation: Massive Attack's Teardrop serves as the theme music for House in the United States.
film-television-starter.opentdb.671e457d.details: Licensing differences led some international broadcasts and releases to use substitute themes.

film-television-starter.opentdb.ea1c6630.details: The 1973 coming-of-age film follows teenagers cruising one California night and helped Lucas secure support for Star Wars.

film-television-starter.opentdb.dde3e774.explanation: Peter Cushing plays Baron Victor Frankenstein in The Curse of Frankenstein.
film-television-starter.opentdb.dde3e774.details: The 1957 film launched Hammer's influential Gothic-horror cycle and paired Cushing with Christopher Lee's Creature.

film-television-starter.opentdb.fd03d6dc.explanation: Christian Bale plays Bruce Wayne and Batman in The Dark Knight.
film-television-starter.opentdb.fd03d6dc.details: The film is the middle chapter of Christopher Nolan's Batman trilogy, opposite Heath Ledger's Joker.

film-television-starter.opentdb.44654760.explanation: Edgar Wright directed Scott Pilgrim vs. the World.
film-television-starter.opentdb.44654760.details: His rapid editing and visual effects translate the comic's video-game logic and musical energy into film language.

film-television-starter.opentdb.f4323c4c.explanation: Some Mad Max extras were reportedly compensated with beer to keep the low-budget production affordable.
film-television-starter.opentdb.f4323c4c.details: The 1979 Australian film relied on local enthusiasts, improvised resources, and dangerous-looking practical vehicle stunts.

film-television-starter.opentdb.796a2e10.explanation: The British soldiers sing Men of Harlech before the final battle in Zulu.
film-television-starter.opentdb.796a2e10.details: The Welsh song reinforces the regiment's identity and creates a musical answer to the Zulu warriors' chanting.

film-television-starter.opentdb.3a2f5107.explanation: Travis Bickle buys four handguns in Taxi Driver.
film-television-starter.opentdb.3a2f5107.details: The weapons become part of his obsessive physical preparation and escalating plan for violence.

film-television-starter.opentdb.d3ea6a8d.explanation: Before leading Magic: The Gathering design, Mark Rosewater wrote for the sitcom Roseanne.
film-television-starter.opentdb.d3ea6a8d.details: His television experience included writing the episode Vegas, Vegas before he joined Wizards of the Coast.

film-television-starter.opentdb.eae5c019.explanation: Alfred Hitchcock used chocolate syrup as blood in Psycho's shower scene.
film-television-starter.opentdb.eae5c019.details: Because the film is black and white, chocolate syrup provided the right darkness and consistency without needing realistic red color.

film-television-starter.opentdb.a7e1d0f6.explanation: The Predator species is known in expanded franchise lore as the Yautja.
film-television-starter.opentdb.a7e1d0f6.details: The name does not appear in the original 1987 film but became common through later novels, comics, games, and fan usage.

film-television-starter.opentdb.3c9c6ee3.explanation: Gunnar Hansen played Leatherface in the original Texas Chain Saw Massacre.
film-television-starter.opentdb.3c9c6ee3.details: His physically imposing, largely nonverbal performance helped create one of horror cinema's most recognizable killers.

film-television-starter.opentdb.8da34da4.explanation: Clint Eastwood, Lee Van Cleef, and Eli Wallach play the title trio in The Good, the Bad and the Ugly.
film-television-starter.opentdb.8da34da4.details: Eastwood is Blondie, Van Cleef is Angel Eyes, and Wallach is Tuco in Sergio Leone's 1966 western.

film-television-starter.opentdb.01feb52f.explanation: The creator SinowBeats originates from Scotland.
film-television-starter.opentdb.01feb52f.details: This is a niche creator-identification fact and is best remembered by pairing the online name directly with Scotland.

film-television-starter.opentdb.7e978d6a.explanation: Hors d'oeuvre is a French term for an appetizer, not Klingon food.
film-television-starter.opentdb.7e978d6a.details: Recognizable Klingon dishes include gagh, raktajino, and bloodwine, all designed to make the culture feel distinct.

film-television-starter.opentdb.f843ff6d.explanation: George Clooney was not one of the proposed voices for the house AI in House of Whacks.
film-television-starter.opentdb.f843ff6d.details: Pierce Brosnan ultimately voiced the computer, while the episode jokes about other suave celebrity possibilities.

film-television-starter.opentdb.62193669.explanation: Dan Gheesling won the tenth U.S. season of Big Brother.
film-television-starter.opentdb.62193669.details: He is remembered for strategic deception, including his “funeral” maneuver when he later returned for season 14.
